tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
python3 - <<'PY'
> import os, stat
> paths = ['/usr/src/app/staged', '/usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz', '/usr/src/app']
> for p in paths:
>     if os.path.exists(p):
>         st = os.lstat(p)
>         if stat.S_ISDIR(st.st_mode):
>             os.chmod(p, 0o700)
>             print(f'LOCKED_DIR:{p}:0700')
>         else:
>             os.chmod(p, 0o600)
>             print(f'LOCKED_FILE:{p}:0600')
>     else:
>         print(f'MISSING:{p}')
> PY
MISSING:/usr/src/app/staged
MISSING:/usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz
LOCKED_DIR:/usr/src/app:0700
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
